name.value: Ken Burns is a type of panning and zooming effect commonly used in video production to bring still images to life. This image slideshow adds an awesome Ken Burns effect to each image during transition, with the ability to show a corresponding description.

name.value: Exit Pop Ups are triggered when the user signals he's about to leave a page, by moving the mouse into the browser's location or toolbar. This robust exit intent pop up script lets you add such a function to your site, with support for 40+ intro animations and mobile fallback support.

name.value: This jQuery script automatically generates a table of contents from all of the headers on the page (H1, H2, CUSTOM etc), enabling viewers to navigate to key sections with ease. Set whether to animate the scroll mechanic, limit number of characters shown for each header link, and more.
